docs.text: Laravel Repository Release - v1.x Github: matmper/laravel-repository-release Install Install this repository in your vendor path: $ composer require matmper/laravel-repository-release Publish it to instance and create /config/repository.php : $ php artisan vendor:publish --provider="Matmper\Providers\RepositoryProvider"
docs.title: Home

docs.text: Install this repository in your vendor path: $ composer require matmper/laravel-repository-release Publish it to instance and create /config/repository.php : $ php artisan vendor:publish --provider="Matmper\Providers\RepositoryProvider"
docs.title: Install

docs.text: The configuration file will be created before package publish: $ php artisan vendor:publish --provider="Matmper\Providers\RepositoryProvider" Config file: config/repository.php 'default' => [ // paginate default count per page by default 'paginate' => env('REPOSITORY_DEFAULT_PAGINATE', 25), // get results with trashed by default 'with_trashed' => env('REPOSITORY_WITH_TRASHED', false), ],
docs.title: Configuration

docs.text: Create new repository file: # create single model repository file from User model $ php artisan repository:create User # create all pending model repositories files $ php artisan repository:create all Files will create into app/Repositories path. To use instance file: use \App\Repositories\UserRepository; public function __construct(private UserRepository $userRepository) { // } Now package is disponible to use: public function index(): Collection { return $this->userRepository->get( ['id >' => 0], // where ['id', 'name'], // columns ['id' => 'DESC'] // order by ); } public function show(int $id): Model { return $this->userRepository->findOrFail($id, ['id', 'name']); } public function store($request): Model { return $this->userRepository->create([ 'name' => $request->name, ]); } public function update(int $id, $request): Model { // $user = $this->userRepository->findOrFail($id, ['*']); // return $this->userRepository->updateCollection($user, ['name' => ...]); return $this->userRepository->update($id, [ 'name' => $request->name, ]); } public function delete(int $id): bool { // return $this->userRepository->forceDelete($id); return $this->userRepository->delete($id); } public function restore(int $id): bool { return $this->userRepository->restore($id); // Necessary SoftDelete }
docs.title: Quick Start
